```{r Validation rule 2: active enrolment with completed surveillance end}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$enrollments |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$status == "ACTIVE") |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "end" &
                        .data$status == "COMPLETED") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "event_key"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 2L),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 2L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = .data$event_key,
        context        = list(list()),
        .keep = "none"))
```
